title: India vs New Zealand T20 Series 2026: Full Schedule, Venues, and Timings
description: Check the full India vs New Zealand T20 series 2026 schedule. Match dates, venues, and timings explained in simple words for cricket fans.

blocks.text: The India vs New Zealand T20 series began on January 21, 2026. It is a five-match T20 series that will be held in India. These are the matches that fans look forward to before the T20 World Cup 2026. To all cricket fans who love to bet live, it is easy to bet with Reddy Anna Book where all bets can be placed during the game. You have the chance to follow odds, track players, and win prizes in real time. Why the Series is Important This series is more than just five T20 matches. It is a chance for teams to test players and strategies. India wants to win at home, and New Zealand wants to adapt to Indian pitches. Fans using Reddy Anna Login can stay updated on match timings, player stats, and live betting options. This makes it easier to place smart bets during the game. Full Match Schedule Here’s the schedule for all five T20 matches: 1st T20I – Jan 21, 2026, Nagpur, 7:00 PM IST 2nd T20I – Jan 23, 2026, Raipur, 7:00 PM IST 3rd T20I – Jan 25, 2026, Guwahati, 7:00 PM IST 4th T20I – Jan 28, 2026, Visakhapatnam, 7:00 PM IST 5th T20I – Jan 31, 2026, Thiruvananthapuram, 7:00 PM IST Each match is perfect for live betting. Using your Reddy Anna Book ID helps you keep track of all bets and winnings safely. Series Venues Nagpur – Vidarbha Cricket Association Stadium The pitch is batting-friendly. High scores are likely. Betting on top scorers is a good idea. Raipur – Shaheed Veer Narayan Singh International Stadium This ground gives a fair chance to both batsmen and bowlers. You can bet on wickets or total runs. Guwahati – Barsapara Stadium The pitch is slower, helping spinners. Place live bets on spin bowlers or team totals. Visakhapatnam – ACA-VDCA Stadium This ground suits stroke players. Powerplay bets and top scorer bets can be smart. Thiruvananthapuram – Greenfield International Stadium The final match may be high-pressure. Live betting on match winners or player performance is exciting. Key Players to Watch India: Suryakumar Yadav, Ishan Kishan, Jasprit Bumrah. New Zealand: Mitchell Santner, Glenn Phillips, Daryl Mitchell. Watching these players helps you make better live betting decisions.
